subtitle: Detect abnormal customer spend and preview platform quota limits. Detection and alerting only; quota write-back is off by default.
enforceOffHint: Quota write-back is disabled. Set RP_RISK_ENFORCE=on and restart the service to enable it.
rulesDesc: A customer is flagged when recent daily spend divided by the baseline daily average reaches the multiplier, and recent spend is at least the absolute floor.
spikeMultiplierHint: Recent daily spend over baseline daily average at or above this value counts as a spike.
absFloorHint: Recent spend must reach this amount to alert, filtering out small-amount noise.
baselineDaysHint: Number of prior days averaged as the baseline.
scanDesc: Scans the top spenders per site (top 50) comparing today against the baseline average. Running a scan also opens spend-spike alerts.
scanEmptyDesc: No customers exceeded the spike thresholds. Run a scan to refresh.
scanNeverDesc: Run a scan to detect abnormal customer spend across sites.
limitDesc: Quotas are per platform and window. Choose one to preview the merged full-replacement, then write back. Write-back merges with current values first, so untouched platforms and windows are preserved.
limitHint: Empty means unlimited; 0 means fully disabled; a positive number is the USD cap.
